overall.description: First-person perspective gameplay footage showing steady movement through a snowy mountain canyon. The player navigates a frozen valley surrounded by steep snow-covered cliffs and rocky outcrops under an overcast winter sky, with a weapon visible in the foreground.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow toward the canyon entrance with a cylindrical weapon visible in the foreground

entered.detail: snow-covered rocky mountain slope forming the left boundary of the wide valley
steep mountain ridge with scattered evergreen trees covering the right slope
frozen canyon floor covered in deep snow with visible ice patches
tall snow-capped mountain peak visible at the end of the valley
cluster of pine trees scattered across the right mountain slope

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide snowy mountain valley under an overcast sky. The camera moves forward through deep snow toward a distant peak, flanked by snow-covered mountain ranges on both sides. Sparse evergreen trees dot the right slope while the left presents rocky cliff faces.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrowing canyon passage with rising rock walls

events.description: open valley narrows into a confined canyon passage with steep rock walls rising on both sides

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the terrain becomes more enclosed by rocky canyon walls, navigating the narrowing path

segments.scene_description: The valley transitions into a narrower canyon as the mountain ranges close in on both sides. The distant peak and trees disappear from view behind the rising canyon walls. The path becomes more confined with snow-covered rocky faces now prominent in the mid-ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep canyon gorge with steep cliff faces

events.description: camera makes a slight left turn to navigate the winding canyon path as the right wall closes in

agents.ego_description: navigating through the tight canyon passage with high rock walls on either side, adjusting direction slightly to follow the winding path

segments.scene_description: The canyon becomes deeply enclosed with steep cliff faces now very close on both sides. The sky is mostly obscured by the high canyon walls. The path winds through the snow-covered gorge, requiring slight directional adjustments as the terrain narrows further.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a vast snowy valley that gradually constricts into a deeply enclosed mountain canyon. It begins in a wide expanse under an overcast sky, moving through deep snow toward a distant peak flanked by sparse evergreen trees and rocky cliff faces. As the camera advances, the valley transitions into a narrower passage where the surrounding mountain ranges close in, causing the distant peak and trees to disappear behind rising walls of snow-covered rock. The scene then shifts into a confined gorge with steep cliffs pressing in from both sides, mostly obscuring the sky. Finally, the path winds through the tightening terrain, requiring slight directional adjustments as the environment becomes a deeply enclosed snowy corridor.
